0fefe9e34645c56e.name: Avalara state-by-state candy sales-tax guide (information dated October 2024), applying the SST candy definition and each state's grocery treatment, cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where the two agree. Candy is taxed as non-food in most states even where groceries are exempt. Omitted because the sources disagree: DC, KS, OK. Alaska (local-only) is also absent.

10b336d225cbfb99.name: Tax Foundation — State and Local Sales Tax Rates, Midyear 2026 (state-level rates as of 2026-07-01, published 2026-07-06); figures as published, except where a row note restores statutory precision the source rounds

110c6c66237f65a7.name: General tangible personal property is the core sales-tax base — taxable in every state that levies a general sales tax; benchmark-confirmed uniform. Alaska (local-only) is absent.

1556e87674b0ad19.name: TaxValet complete state-by-state guide to downloadable/electronically-delivered custom software (information dated 2024-01-16: taxable in AL, CT, DC, HI, IA, MS, NE, NM, OH, SD, TN, WV; exempt as a nontaxable service elsewhere), cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where they agree. Omitted where they disagree: AL, IA. Alaska (local-only) absent.

17576563ef883d5c.name: Printed books are taxable tangible personal property in every state that levies sales tax; benchmark-confirmed uniform (state-level; some states exempt narrow sub-classes like textbooks). Alaska (local-only) absent.

17d92ca1f8a54430.name: Newspapers are exempt from sales tax in the states that levy one — a long-standing, widespread press exemption; benchmark-confirmed uniform. Alaska (local-only) absent.

21a8bc973082ef7b.name: Tax Foundation — State Sales Taxes and Clothing Exemptions (data updated 2024-09-06), cross-checked against an independent state-by-state clothing compilation. Four states fully exempt general apparel (MN, NJ, PA, VT). Three exempt clothing below a per-item price threshold — Massachusetts ($175), New York (state portion, $110), Rhode Island ($250) — carried as conditional with exemptBelowCents. Alaska (no state sales tax; clothing taxability is local-only) is absent.

32d5091bb80bce14.name: Professional services are exempt from sales tax in almost every state; only the broad-base gross-receipts states (Hawaii, New Mexico, South Dakota, West Virginia) tax them. Well-established treatment, cross-checked against an independent compilation. Alaska (local-only) absent.

462e834f1dfb6652.name: State DOR consensus, cross-checked against an independent compilation (46/46 agreement): prepared food (restaurant meals, heated or combined-by-seller food) is in the taxable base of every state that levies a general sales tax — even states that exempt grocery food ingredients tax prepared food. Records only whether prepared food is taxable at the GENERAL rate; many states/localities add a separate prepared-food/meals tax above it, not modeled here. Alaska (local-only) is absent.

4f926325870ceea0.name: Tax Foundation soda treatment (whether soda follows the state's grocery treatment or is taxed separately) applied with each state's grocery status, cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where they agree. Omitted where they disagree: KS, OK, SC. Alaska (local-only) absent.

5764a763ab126c51.name: Sales Tax Institute — Economic Nexus State Guide (thresholds & measurement rules), cross-validated against Avalara — State-by-state guide to economic nexus laws; measurement dimensions carried only where both sources agree

5e899a56fbcc1da5.name: Consumer electronics are standard taxable tangible personal property in every sales-tax state; benchmark-confirmed uniform. Alaska (local-only) absent.

6221ca9b912041ae.name: Avalara service-taxability guide: personal-care services (massage, nail, tanning, etc.), taxable in the listed states plus the broad-base states (HI/NM/SD/WV), exempt elsewhere. Cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where they agree. Omitted where the sources disagree: KY, NJ. Alaska (local-only) absent.

6904348542a4fc67.name: Printed magazines/periodicals are taxable tangible personal property in every state that levies sales tax (unlike newspapers), cross-checked against an independent compilation (uniform); some states narrowly exempt subscription delivery by mail. Alaska (local-only) absent.

6dea1e12e65d7b4e.name: Agreement of two dated practitioner SaaS-by-state compilations (TaxJar and Anrok guides); only states where both give the same clear determination are included — conflicting, conditional (B2B/B2C) and partial regimes are deliberately absent

7b5cc826ee637faa.name: Consumer Healthcare Products Association / AARP list of states exempting over-the-counter medicines (CT, MD, MN, NJ, NY, PA, TX, VT, VA and DC exempt; the rest tax OTC drugs), cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where they agree. Omitted where the two sources disagree: FL. Alaska (local-only) absent.

7f51a00d3b74a727.name: Stripe grocery-tax-by-state guide (2025-2026), reconciled with the documented 2026 transitions (Arkansas & Illinois eliminated their state grocery tax 2026-01-01; Mississippi cut 7%->5% 2025-07-01), cross-checked against an independent compilation. Full-rate states (HI, ID, SD) are taxable; reduced-rate states carry the exact rate. DELIBERATELY OMITTED because a clean current determination is not available: Alaska (no state sales tax; local-only), Illinois (state-exempt from 2026 but localities may keep a 1% grocery tax), Alabama (3% vs a contingent 2% phase-down, unresolved).

8365f371f83e692e.name: Durable medical equipment and prosthetic/medical devices are exempt from sales tax (generally on prescription or for home use) in every state that levies one — a near-universal medical exemption confirmed by the state exemption lists (AZ, AR, CA, CO, FL, HI, ID, IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, MD, MA, MI, NC, OK, SC, SD, TX, UT, WV and the without-prescription states MN, MO, NJ, NY, ND, PA, RI, VT, VA, WI, ME), cross-checked against an independent compilation (uniform). Alaska (local-only) absent.

89a80eed7bad1487.name: Agreement of the TaxJar and Stripe origin/destination sourcing guides (2026); INTRASTATE sourcing only — interstate/remote sales are destination-sourced post-Wayfair regardless. `mixed` marks states where the rule splits by jurisdiction layer or seller type (California, Illinois); the four no-general-sales-tax states (DE, MT, NH, OR) are omitted. Only classifications on which both guides agree are shipped.

a4683959d7d952ec.name: Avalara state-by-state service-taxability guide: repair/maintenance of tangible personal property, taxable in the listed states plus the broad-base gross-receipts states (HI/NM/SD/WV), exempt in CA/CO/IL/IN/MA/MI. Cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where they agree. Omitted where the sources disagree: AL, DC, GA, IN, ME, MI, ND, RI, VA. Alaska (local-only) absent.

a787e18d822ad295.name: Federation of Tax Administrators / state DOR consensus — prescription drugs (drugs dispensable only by prescription for human use) are exempt from sales tax in all 45 states that levy one; a universal, long-standing exemption. Cross-checked against an independent state-by-state compilation (46/46 agreement). Alaska (no state sales tax; local-only) is absent.

aeb13737475a4433.name: Avalara guide to electronically-delivered prewritten (canned) software — the ecommerce case — cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where the two agree. Prewritten software is taxable tangible personal property in most states; a minority exempt electronic delivery. States where the sources disagree on the electronic-delivery treatment (CA, CO, FL, GA, MO, SC) are omitted; software on tangible media is taxable everywhere. Alaska (local-only) absent.

b56603643f1a7807.name: Avalara service-taxability guide: data-processing/computer services, taxable in the listed states plus the broad-base states (HI/NM/SD/WV), exempt elsewhere. Cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where they agree. Omitted where the sources disagree: KY, MN, MS, WA. Alaska (local-only) absent.

bc3ea27a2cfd7c4f.name: Avalara service-taxability guide: information/web-hosting services, taxable in the listed states plus the broad-base states (HI/NM/SD/WV), exempt elsewhere. Cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where they agree. Omitted where the sources disagree: MD, OH, PA, WA. Alaska (local-only) absent.

cbae48e5537bf600.name: Numeral dietary-supplement sales-tax guide (updated April 2026: CT, FL, KS, MD, MI, NJ, NY, TX, VT, WA, WV, WY exempt; the rest tax supplements), cross-checked against an independent compilation and shipped only where they agree. Labeling-conditional (CA/MA/PA) and reduced-rate (IL/UT) supplement regimes a boolean cannot represent are omitted. Alaska (local-only) absent.

cd7eacb1ab482e64.name: Avalara state-by-state guide to the taxability of digital products (downloaded/streamed digital goods: ebooks, music, video), information dated 2026-07-08, cross-checked against an independent compilation. Covers digital goods generally; a few states treat streaming differently from downloads. Alaska (no state sales tax; local-only) is absent.

cfe233e2298bd3fa.name: AgentTax dedicated AI-service sales-tax guide (2026-07-06, verified against state DOR sources): AI/API access is taxed where a state taxes SaaS / data processing / digital automated services / prewritten software; exempt in CA (through 2026, taxable 2027), FL, GA, IL, MI, MO, NV, OK, VA. Cross-checked against an independent compilation AND our own SaaS overlay; the 16 states where the dedicated AI source calls it taxable but both the benchmark and the SaaS treatment say exempt (AL, AR, CO, IA, ID, IN, KS, ME, MN, MS, NC, ND, NE, NJ, WI, WY) are omitted as genuinely contested in this fast-moving 2025-26 area. Alaska (local-only) absent.

f2d731652c06fa43.name: Furniture is standard taxable tangible personal property in every sales-tax state; benchmark-confirmed uniform. Alaska (local-only) absent.

The service period is each record's effective window. 41 tribal dual-code areas (buyer-status-dependent rates) are listed in excludedLocations.

baseline.note: Gross receipts tax (GRT), statutory 4.875% state share (source rounds to 4.88%); location rates automated from TRD's public ArcGIS layer as combined totals.
